title: We Have A Pope
content:
"Habemus Papam", announced Cardinal Madina Estevez.

!-/gallery/misc/pope_benedict-xvi.jpg!

"Cardinal Joseph Ratzinger":http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joseph_Cardinal_Ratzinger of Germany is now *Pope Benedict XVI* (16).

%(source)"CNN":http://us.cnn.com/2005/WORLD/europe/04/19/pope.tuesday/index.html%
